name: Solitaire - Voodoo Card Game!
core_loop: Draw cards, stack them in descending alternating colors, and move them to foundation piles before the timer runs out.
audience_proxy: Casual players of all ages, leaning towards adults seeking quick, familiar mental puzzles.
visual_style: Classic 2D flat design with a traditional green felt aesthetic.

palette.description: Traditional casino green background with stark white cards and bright red accents.
